cause_analysis.narrative: ItsBrandingTime | Hair Extensions, Hair Color & Hair Styling churned on 2026-04-01 after 154 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-22 via app_chat — 10 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 10 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

messages.body: Hey Dr.Denise - every missed call is a client walking away, and spam just eats your time. Zoca's AI receptionist answers every call, filters spam, and books on the line.  Free for 14 days.  Start your trial in one click: https://form.typeform.com/to/SjR080fy#user_id=cb3000f2-d6ff-48c5-93c0-8003f79ea08f
